---
title: "Mixed Strategies and the Indifference Principle"
short-title: "Mixed Strategies"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "How players randomize, why mixed equilibria exist, and how to compute them in R."
keywords: ["mixed strategies", "Nash equilibrium", "indifference principle", "R"]
---

# Mixed Strategies {#sec-mixed-strategies}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
